feedback.text: I believe that this initiative is a great opportunity to defend the consumer, as there are occasions where injustices have come to an end against them, Tal is the case of the video game ‘The crew’ where, at the time when the company that owned the game no longer wanted to maintain it, they decided to remove it from online shops, removing the possibility of continuing to play it even offline, which is a big problem because many consumers who bought the game and went on to buy a cosmetic love of pay lost their money, which is unfair given that it was never clear that the game was closed in the future.
